languages.text: "Бог-Император, укрепи наше мужество против наваждения ксеносов, разожги в нас ненависть, чтобы сокрушить их волшбу!" {n}Арджента молится, не прерываясь ни на секунду, пораженная произошедшим.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Бог-Император, укрепи наше мужество против наваждения ксеносов, разожги в нас ненависть, чтобы сокрушить их волшбу!" {n}Арджента молится, не прерываясь ни на секунду, пораженная произошедшим.{/n}
traits.speaker: ArgentaCompanion

languages.text: "God-Emperor, fortify our courage against the delusions of the xenos, ignite within us a hatred strong enough to shatter their sorceries!" {n}Argenta prays without pause, shocked by what has occurred.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Бог-Император, укрепи наше мужество против наваждения ксеносов, разожги в нас ненависть, чтобы сокрушить их волшбу!" {n}Арджента молится, не прерываясь ни на секунду, пораженная произошедшим.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "God-Emperor, fortify our courage against the delusions of the xenos, ignite within us a hatred strong enough to shatter their sorceries!" {n}Argenta prays without pause, stricken by what has occurred.{/n}

"God-Emperor, fortify our courage against the delusions of the xenos, ignite within us a hatred strong enough to shatter their sorceries!" {n}Argenta prays without pause, shocked by what has occurred.{/n}

"O Emperor, Protector and Father of Mankind, strengthen our courage against the xenos' illusion, and stir up our hatred so that we might crush their sorcery!" {n}Argenta prays without pause, stunned by what has happened.{/n}

"God-Emperor, fortify our courage against the delusions of the xenos, ignite within us a hatred strong enough to shatter their sorceries!" {n}Argenta prays without pause, stricken by what has occurred.{/n}

"God-Emperor, fortify our courage against the delusions of the xenos, ignite within us a hatred strong enough to shatter their sorceries!" {n}Argenta prays without pause, shocked by what has occurred.{/n}

"God-Emperor, fortify our courage against the delusions of the xenos, ignite within us a hatred strong enough to shatter their sorceries!" {n}Argenta prays without pause, shocked by what has occurred.{/n}

languages.text: “神皇啊，请赐予我们勇气，抵御异形的虚妄幻象！请在我们心中，燃起足以粉碎它们巫术的憎恨之火！”{n}震惊于刚才所发生之事，阿洁塔不住地祈祷着。{/n}
languages.original_text: "God-Emperor, fortify our courage against the delusions of the xenos, ignite within us a hatred strong enough to shatter their sorceries!" {n}Argenta prays without pause, shocked by what has occurred.{/n}

traits.locale_text: “神皇啊，请赐予我们勇气，抵御异形的虚妄幻象！请在我们心中，燃起足以粉碎它们巫术的憎恨之火！”{n}震惊于刚才所发生之事，阿洁塔不住地祈祷着。{/n}

languages.text: « Empereur-Dieu, donnez-nous le courage d'affronter les illusions des xénos, attisez en nous la haine et guidez notre bras pour briser leurs sortilèges ! » {n}Sous le choc, Argenta prie sans discontinuer.{/n}
languages.original_text: "God-Emperor, fortify our courage against the delusions of the xenos, ignite within us a hatred strong enough to shatter their sorceries!" {n}Argenta prays without pause, shocked by what has occurred.{/n}

traits.locale_text: « Empereur-Dieu, donnez-nous le courage d'affronter les illusions des xénos, attisez en nous la haine et guidez notre bras pour briser leurs sortilèges ! » {n}Sous le choc, Argenta prie sans discontinuer.{/n}

languages.text: "Tanrı İmparator... Zenoların sanrılarına karşı cesaretimizi güçlendir, içimizde onların büyülerini paramparça edecek kadar güçlü bir nefret alevlendir!" {n}Olanlar karşısında şoka giren Argenta, durmaksızın dua ediyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: "God-Emperor, fortify our courage against the delusions of the xenos, ignite within us a hatred strong enough to shatter their sorceries!" {n}Argenta prays without pause, shocked by what has occurred.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Tanrı İmparator... Zenoların sanrılarına karşı cesaretimizi güçlendir, içimizde onların büyülerini paramparça edecek kadar güçlü bir nefret alevlendir!" {n}Olanlar karşısında şoka giren Argenta, durmaksızın dua ediyor.{/n}

languages.text: «¡Dios Emperador, refuerza nuestro valor contra las ilusiones de los xenos, y haz arder en nosotros un odio capaz de destruir su brujería!». {n}Argenta reza sin cesar, conmocionada por lo sucedido.{/n}
languages.original_text: "God-Emperor, fortify our courage against the delusions of the xenos, ignite within us a hatred strong enough to shatter their sorceries!" {n}Argenta prays without pause, shocked by what has occurred.{/n}

traits.locale_text: «¡Dios Emperador, refuerza nuestro valor contra las ilusiones de los xenos, y haz arder en nosotros un odio capaz de destruir su brujería!». {n}Argenta reza sin cesar, conmocionada por lo sucedido.{/n}

languages.text: "Gottimperator, festige unseren Mut gegen die Täuschungen der Xenos, entfache in uns einen Hass, der stark genug ist, ihre Hexereien zu zerschmettern!" {n}Schockiert von den Geschehnissen, betet Argenta ohne Pause.{/n}
languages.original_text: "God-Emperor, fortify our courage against the delusions of the xenos, ignite within us a hatred strong enough to shatter their sorceries!" {n}Argenta prays without pause, shocked by what has occurred.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Gottimperator, festige unseren Mut gegen die Täuschungen der Xenos, entfache in uns einen Hass, der stark genug ist, ihre Hexereien zu zerschmettern!" {n}Schockiert von den Geschehnissen, betet Argenta ohne Pause.{/n}

languages.text: 「神皇帝、異種族の妄想に打ち勝つ勇気を我々に授けよ。彼らの呪文を打ち砕くほどの憎しみを我々に燃え上がらせよ！」{n}アルジェンタは、起こったことに衝撃を受け、絶えず祈りを捧げている.{/n}
languages.original_text: "God-Emperor, fortify our courage against the delusions of the xenos, ignite within us a hatred strong enough to shatter their sorceries!" {n}Argenta prays without pause, shocked by what has occurred.{/n}

traits.locale_text: 「神皇帝、異種族の妄想に打ち勝つ勇気を我々に授けよ。彼らの呪文を打ち砕くほどの憎しみを我々に燃え上がらせよ！」{n}アルジェンタは、起こったことに衝撃を受け、絶えず祈りを捧げている.{/n}
